hotels.name: Hotel Villa Annette

This small family-run hotel is located on a protected part of the hill overlooking the bay in Rabac, and offers a beautiful panoramic view of the Kvarner Bay and the islands of Cres, LoÅ¡inj and Unije.
Decorated in a modern style, Hotel Villa Annette is one of the best boutique hotels in Istria. Accessible staff, peace and a pleasant atmosphere are just some of the attributes of this facility.

All apartments include air conditioning and free internet access, and their special feature is the beautiful sea view. The hotel also includes a beautiful outdoor pool next to the terrace, where guests can relax with a wonderful outdoor ambiance.
